scenarios.description: sourceRange returns UntrackedAttr when parent is null (parent==null branch)
sourceRange delegates to parent.sourceRange when parent is non-null (parent!=null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Attributes stub returns specific range; stub used to isolate parent behavior
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the Range.AttributeRange instance returned by stubParent.sourceRange("key")
pseudocode: // stub Attributes to return a known range
Attributes stubParent = new Attributes(){ public Range.AttributeRange sourceRange(String k){ return new Range.AttributeRange(1,2,3,4); }};
